full_text: ## Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly. # agentic-ai. AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters. RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs. ### microsoft / ai-agents-for-beginners. 🌊 The leading agent meta-harness for Claude. Composio powers 1000+ toolkits, tool search, context management, authentication, and a sandboxed workbench to help you build AI agents that turn intent into action. Enjoy an autonomous agent that thinks, browses the web, and code for the sole cost of electricity. Persistent file-based planning for AI coding agents and long-running agentic tasks. 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.
